examples: We answered that we would accept the invitation

meanings.definition: give the correct answer or solution to

examples: The question concerning the meaning of life cannot be answered

meanings.definition: give a defence or refutation of (a charge) or in (an argument)
examples: The defendant answered to all the charges of the prosecution
She must answer for her actions

meanings.definition: be sufficient; be adequate, either in quality or quantity
examples: This car suits my purpose well
A 'B' grade doesn't suffice to get me into medical school
The drawing of the suspect answers to the description the victim gave

meanings.definition: be satisfactory for; meet the requirements of or serve the purpose of
react to a stimulus or command
examples: The steering of my new car answers to the slightest touch
